questions.q: What is an allergy test at home?
questions.a: An at-home allergy test checks your sensitivities to foods, dust, pollen, or other triggers.

questions.q: What is mother and baby care at home in Dubai?
questions.a: It's a service that supports mothers in recovery and provides newborn care — all in the comfort of home.

questions.q: Who provides mother and baby care?
questions.a: DHA-licensed nurses and doctors with training in neonatal and maternal care.

questions.q: Can NADZ help with postnatal care?
questions.a: Yes, we support wound healing, breastfeeding, nutrition, and overall recovery.

questions.q: Do you offer newborn care services?
questions.a: Yes, including feeding, bathing, hygiene, and monitoring vital signs.

questions.q: Is the service safe for infants?
questions.a: Absolutely — care is delivered by trained medical professionals.

questions.q: Can I book night-time or 24/7 care for my baby?
questions.a: Yes, NADZ Home Healthcare offers flexible hourly and round-the-clock care.

questions.q: What is POC testing at home?
questions.a: Point-of-Care (POC) testing provides instant medical results at your location using portable devices.

questions.q: What POC tests are available with NADZ?
questions.a: Hemoglobin, blood sugar, cholesterol, infection tests, WBC, and vital sign screenings.
Results are highly reliable and validated against hospital standards.

questions.q: How fast do I get results?
questions.a: Most POC tests deliver results in under 5 minutes.
DHA-certified doctors and nurses using hospital-grade equipment.

questions.q: Can I book POC testing for corporate or group checkups?
questions.a: Yes, NADZ Home Healthcare provides rapid testing for individuals, families, and corporate wellness programs.

questions.q: What is O₂ therapy at home in Dubai?
questions.a: Oxygen therapy delivers concentrated oxygen through devices at your home to improve breathing.
Patients with asthma, COPD, post-COVID recovery, sleep apnea, or low oxygen levels.

questions.q: How is oxygen delivered at home?
questions.a: Through concentrators, cylinders, or portable devices managed by our team.

questions.q: Is oxygen therapy safe at home?
questions.a: Yes, with NADZ's DHA-licensed doctors and nurses monitoring every session.

questions.q: Can I book emergency oxygen support?
questions.a: Yes, we provide urgent oxygen delivery and setup 24/7.

questions.q: Do you offer long-term oxygen therapy at home?
questions.a: Yes, for chronic patients, we provide customized, ongoing oxygen programs.
